productDisplayName: Nike Men's Zoom Vomero White Shoe
description: Perfect for underpronators and runners with a natural gait, the nike Zoom Vomero+ 6 has lightweight cushioning like its' predecessors, but with a better Fit and support. With a Gender specific midfoot and elasticised mesh panels that lock the foot in place, it supports all phases of your run. Being a nike+ range shoe, you can add on to it compatible iPod nanos, Sports watches, sport bands and others from the Nike+ range and clock your runs, calories, track your routes and much more.Upper Heavily meshed upper with elasticized mesh panels on the forefoot and mouth, and fixed panels on the sides and back foot for maximum ventilation and to lock the fit in place to create an adaptable fit Synthetic overlays with swoosh branding on the sides for shoe structure Padded sockliner for in-step comfort Lace-up system with cushioned tongue for snug fit Mesh inner sleeve that wraps around the entire foot for a plush, comfortable fit Reflective elements for safe running even in low light conditions Midsole Nike Zoom units in the forefoot and heel for responsive cushioning Full length Cushlon midsole for lightweight comfort, impact protection and durability Outsole Blown Rubber outsole with BRS 1000 crash pad in the heel for efficient stride and maximum cushioning Multiple rubber and traction patterns offering a smooth stride Gender specific flex grooves for improved flexibility and a more natural range of motion offering a seamless heel to toe transition Transparent trusstic unit in the medial arch with extra support to stabilize the foot and allow natural motion, especially to underpronators Shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
